{"code":"(def email-confirmation {:to "oncall@acme.io" :subject "Top error" :status "sent"})

(def issue (apply max-key :count (filter #(= "unresolved" (:status %)) (sentry_issues))))

(def summary {:level (:level issue) :project (:project issue) :count (:count issue) :id (:id issue)})

(def combined {:email email-confirmation :issue summary})

combined"}
